Gulte"Time Doesn't Speak...": Rajinikanth Reacts To TVK Leader's Remarks On Him  NDTV'Time doesn't speak, but it waits': Rajinikanth reacts to TVK's 'DMK threat' claim  The Times of IndiaContrary to truth: Rajinikanth rejects TVK leader’s claim of DMK threat  India TodayRajinikanth debunks TVK leader Aadhav Arjuna’s claim on the actor refraining from politics  The Hindu
